Undergraduate thesis, Auburn, 2023. PL.Arch examines how 3D printing, automation, and AI can integrate into architectural practice without losing the human side of design. The proposal; a 42,000 sqft artist residency on Kyoto's Kamo River, using hybrid additive manufacturing (Contour Crafting, WAAM, stereolithography) paired with organic, biomimetic form.
